st-joseph-church-shelburne-falls.page_layout_notes: Self-published bulletin. Page 2 is entirely Mass intentions interleaved with schedule times — do NOT extract individual Masses from page 2. The regular schedule is: Sat 4pm (St. John the Baptist), Sat 6pm (St. Christopher Mission), Sun 8am & 10:30am, Mon/Tue/Thu/Fri/Sat 9am, Wed 5:30pm.
known_recurring: Saturday 4:00 PM Mass at St. John the Baptist
Saturday 6:00 PM Mass at St. Christopher Mission
st-joseph-church-shelburne-falls.parsing_notes: Cluster parish with St. John the Baptist and St. Christopher Mission. Deacon Tom Rabbitt is retired — skip per clergy rules.

st-mary-s-church-longmeadow.page_layout_notes: LPi bulletin, standard layout. Schedule on page 1, intentions on page 2.

immaculate-conception-church-indian-orch.page_layout_notes: Standard layout. Bilingual parish (English/Polish). Schedule on page 1.
immaculate-conception-church-indian-orch.parsing_notes: Bilingual English/Polish parish. Mass schedule includes language designations.

blessed-sacrament-church-greenfield.page_layout_notes: Multi-campus parish (Blessed Trinity). Page 1 has schedule in TWO formats — extract once only. BSC = Blessed Sacrament Church, HTC = Holy Trinity Church, PAC = Our Lady of Peace Adoration Chapel.
blessed-sacrament-church-greenfield.parsing_notes: Cluster parish: Blessed Sacrament (BSC), Holy Trinity (HTC), Our Lady of Peace Chapel (PAC). Schedule appears twice on page 1 — extract the most structured version only.

our-lady-of-the-valley-church-easthampto.page_layout_notes: Standard layout. Schedule on page 1. TLM = Traditional Latin Mass.
our-lady-of-the-valley-church-easthampto.parsing_notes: Bilingual English/Polish parish. Monthly Polish Mass last Sunday at 8:00am. Gorzkie Zale is a Polish Lenten devotion (Bitter Lamentations).

st-agnes-church-dalton.page_layout_notes: LPi bulletin. Cluster parish with St. Patrick's. Page 5 is faith formation content that causes JSON parse errors — skip.
st-agnes-church-dalton.parsing_notes: Cluster parish: St. Agnes and St. Patrick's in Dalton. Life Teen Mass is academic year only.

st-michael-church-brattleboro.page_layout_notes: Self-published bulletin. Page 2 is a 'This Week' calendar listing every daily Mass, rosary, and event as individual line items. Do NOT extract individual daily services from this calendar — they duplicate the recurring schedule on page 1.
known_recurring: Confessions Tue-Fri after Mass, Sat 2:45-3:30 PM
st-michael-church-brattleboro.parsing_notes: Page 2 'This Week' calendar is a known problem — individual daily Masses/rosaries should be skipped. Only extract genuinely new events from that page.
